item.title: White Identity Is Galvanizing the Right
item.description: He wrote a book on anti-white bias. The White House noticed.

item.title: The Democrats Could Still Mess This Up
item.description: MS NOW anchor Chris Hayes says the party still can’t articulate its vision.

item.title: Does the Iran War Put America First?
item.description: How the antiwar right sees Trump’s foreign policy.

item.title: ‘We’re Going to the Moon and Mars’
item.description: The new head of NASA predicts a manned mission to Mars in 10 years.

item.title: Welcome to the Indian Century
item.description: India is winning the standoff between America and China.

item.title: Anthropic’s Chief on A.I.: ‘We Don’t Know if the Models Are Conscious’
item.description: Dario Amodei shares his utopian — and dystopian — predictions in the near term for artificial intelligence.

item.title: Why Ending Roe Wasn’t Enough for the Pro-Life Movement
item.description: Activists won the legal battle. Are they losing the culture war?

item.title: A Plan to Restore Trust in Science From a ‘Fringe Epidemiologist’
item.description: Jay Bhattacharya, the N.I.H. director, says authorities broke the public’s trust in the Covid era. Now it’s up to outsiders to restore it.

item.title: No, Young Men Are Not Returning to Church
item.description: All the religious trends you’re wrong about.

item.title: Minneapolis Feels ‘Like Being in a Civil War’
item.description: Documenting ICE is dangerous. This man wants you to do it anyway.
